acceptance_criteria.text: Saved services_optimize suggestions can be applied only through a separate confirmed Operator action with explicit confirm_apply.
proof: Focused test proves no mutation without confirmation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Applying suggestions updates internal userservices fields and marks suggestion items fixed.
proof: Service marks suggestion items fixed and refreshes parent job counts.

acceptance_criteria.text: The apply action performs no external provider writes and charges no additional credits.
proof: Apply result and Operator event metadata set external_writes_performed=false and credit_charged=false.
Audit guardrail requires apply confirmation and no-extra-billing markers.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web Operator exposes the confirmation action and shows the applied result.
proof: Applied items are rendered with no external maps changed copy.

acceptance_criteria.text: Route ownership, approval-boundary audit, focused tests, frontend build, and UI smoke pass.
gaps: No authenticated end-to-end browser apply click in this pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_services_optimization.py tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py
known_gaps: Telegram apply command is not included in Sprint 38.
No authenticated end-to-end browser apply click in this pass.
